title: tragopogon buphthalmoides var. humilis
intro: Tragopogon buphthalmoides var. humilis, also known as a lesser salsify, is a type of perennial plant belonging to the sunflower family. The plant's root, taproot, and leaves have been used in traditional medicine to treat various ailments due to its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The health benefits associated with lesser salsify include its ability to soothe digestive issues, reduce inflammation, and support immune function, making it a valuable herbal remedy. Lesser salsify can be prepared as a tea, decoction, or tincture, and it is also used in infusions, often in combination with other herbs, to harness its full medicinal potential.
